Off Calendar May-05-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE
Richard Boone Callaway, Esq., appeared for Plaintiff and moving party: Douglas Conrad
Rebecca Byrne, Esq., appeared for defendant and opposing party: Maurizio Bonicini, MD

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED with modifications: Plaintiff Douglas Conrad's Motion To Compel Production Of Experts For Deposition is granted in part and moot in part. As to Dr. Emmet Keeffe, the deposition shall proceed on May 8 as agreed. As to Dr. Michael Harbour, the deposition shall be set for a date, to be agreed upon by counsel, but no later than May 23, 2008. All requests for sanctions are denied.

MODIFICATION:
- Dr. Harbour withdrawn; Dr. Keefe to appear for deposition on 5/14/08. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Complete Discovery Closer To Trial Date;
Off Calendar Jan-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Rebecca Byrne, Esq., appeared for Defendant & moving party: Maurizio Binicini, M.D.
Boone Callaway, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & opposing party: Douglas Conrad

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Maurizio Bonicini's Motion For Leave To Complete Discovery Closer To Trial Date is denied. The court finds that the discovery was not sought with diligence. The court further finds good cause for the failure to complete the discovery, and the court finds that it is likely that allowing the discovery to take place at this time would likely prevent the case from going to trial on the date set.
Plaintiff has stipulated to the authenticity of the three sets of records that have been produced on the matter that are the subject of this motion. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
